panels.title: Symbols reporting a 1-min bar (per minute, live stream)
panels.description: How many distinct symbols sent a streamed 1-minute bar each minute. Should sit near the universe size (~1000) during market hours, and drop to ~0 when the market is closed. A sustained dip while the market is open means we are losing data.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', ts) AS "time", count(DISTINCT symbol) AS "symbols_with_bars" FROM bars_1m WHERE source = 'stream' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
